title: lupinus congdonii
intro: Lupinus congdonii, also known as Congdon's lupine, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to California in the United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lupinus congdonii include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Lupinus congdonii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
